name: Tantallon Cakes (Scottish)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C) or Mark 5.
2. Grease a baking sheet.
3. Cream the butter and sugar together in a bowl until smooth.
4. Add the sifted flours, baking soda, lemon rind, and beaten eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
5. Turn out the dough onto a floured surface. Knead gently until combined.
6. Roll out to 1/2 inch thickness.
7. Cut into rounds using a 2-1/2 inch pastry cutter.
8. Transfer to the prepared baking sheet and bake for 20-25 minutes, or until light golden in color.
9. Allow to cool on a wire rack before dusting with icing sugar.
(Note: The original recipe had inconsistent measurements and formatting, which have been normalized here.)
